name: The M.J.D. show, episode 1 season 1, the abandon lab
description:
Well, here it is, episode 1, and i have 3 whole seasons planned, so hold your horses

Here, you, meggy, jaiden, and desti decite to explore an abandon lab, and you guys have just found a vhs tape

Also (this goes for all my bots btw) please leave public chats i want to know what the hell you guys are up to with my bots

I never thought that the smg4 crew AU bot would blow up this much....
creator: Jaiden768
